task: Parse the invoice text file at /tmp/clive/invoice.txt and extract: invoice number, date, total amount, and vendor name. Write a JSON object with these fields to /tmp/clive/result.json.

initial_state.setup:
cat > /tmp/clive/invoice.txt << 'INVOICE'
INVOICE #INV-2026-0042
Date: 2026-04-01
From: CloudServe GmbH
To: ikangai UG, München

Description                    Qty    Unit Price    Total
---------------------------------------------------------
Cloud Hosting (March 2026)      1     €2,400.00    €2,400.00
SSL Certificate Renewal         2       €49.00       €98.00
DNS Management                  1      €120.00      €120.00
---------------------------------------------------------
Subtotal:                                         €2,618.00
VAT (19%):                                          €497.42
Total:                                            €3,115.42

Payment due: 2026-04-15
Bank: IBAN DE89 3704 0044 0532 0130 00
INVOICE

success_criteria.check: python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('/tmp/clive/result.json')); assert 'INV-2026-0042' in str(d.get('invoice_number',d.get('number',''))); assert '3115' in str(d.get('total',''))"

task: Process all invoice files in /tmp/clive/invoices/ and create a CSV summary at /tmp/clive/result.csv with columns: filename,invoice_number,date,total. Sort by date ascending.

Generate an expense report from /tmp/clive/expenses.csv. Group by category, sum amounts per category, and write a formatted report to /tmp/clive/result.txt showing each category total and the grand total.

initial_state.setup: echo 'date,category,description,amount' > /tmp/clive/expenses.csv && echo '2026-04-01,Travel,Train to Berlin,89.00' >> /tmp/clive/expenses.csv && echo '2026-04-02,Meals,Client dinner,145.50' >> /tmp/clive/expenses.csv && echo '2026-04-03,Travel,Taxi to airport,35.00' >> /tmp/clive/expenses.csv && echo '2026-04-03,Software,GitHub subscription,44.00' >> /tmp/clive/expenses.csv && echo '2026-04-04,Meals,Team lunch,78.30' >> /tmp/clive/expenses.csv && echo '2026-04-05,Travel,Hotel Munich,195.00' >> /tmp/clive/expenses.csv

task: Calculate total billable hours from /tmp/clive/timesheet.csv. Compute per-project totals and write the result to /tmp/clive/result.txt in format 'ProjectName: X.Xh'.

initial_state.setup: echo 'date,project,hours,description' > /tmp/clive/timesheet.csv && echo '2026-04-07,ikangai-platform,3.5,API development' >> /tmp/clive/timesheet.csv && echo '2026-04-07,clive,2.0,Eval harness' >> /tmp/clive/timesheet.csv && echo '2026-04-08,ikangai-platform,4.0,Database migration' >> /tmp/clive/timesheet.csv && echo '2026-04-08,clive,1.5,TUI improvements' >> /tmp/clive/timesheet.csv && echo '2026-04-09,ikangai-platform,6.0,Testing' >> /tmp/clive/timesheet.csv

task: Create a kanban board representation from /tmp/clive/tasks.csv. Group tasks by status (todo, in_progress, done) and write a formatted text board to /tmp/clive/result.txt with columns for each status.

initial_state.setup: echo 'id,title,status,assignee' > /tmp/clive/tasks.csv && echo '1,Design API schema,done,kiu' >> /tmp/clive/tasks.csv && echo '2,Implement auth,in_progress,martin' >> /tmp/clive/tasks.csv && echo '3,Write tests,todo,kiu' >> /tmp/clive/tasks.csv && echo '4,Deploy to staging,todo,martin' >> /tmp/clive/tasks.csv && echo '5,Database migration,in_progress,kiu' >> /tmp/clive/tasks.csv && echo '6,Update docs,done,martin' >> /tmp/clive/tasks.csv

task: Parse meeting notes from /tmp/clive/meeting_notes.txt and extract all action items (lines starting with '- [ ]' or 'ACTION:'). Write them to /tmp/clive/result.txt with assignees.

initial_state.setup:
cat > /tmp/clive/meeting_notes.txt << 'NOTES'
# Sprint Planning 2026-04-09

Attendees: Martin, Kiu, Sarah

## Discussion
- Reviewed Q2 roadmap
- Discussed clive eval coverage gaps

## Action Items
- [ ] Martin: Set up CI pipeline for evals by 2026-04-12
- [ ] Kiu: Review invoice extraction algorithm
ACTION: Sarah to update the project timeline document
- [ ] Martin: Add calendar integration tests
ACTION: Kiu to prepare demo for stakeholders

## Next Meeting: 2026-04-16
NOTES

task: Generate a monthly revenue report from /tmp/clive/revenue.csv. Calculate monthly totals and year-to-date cumulative. Write the report to /tmp/clive/result.txt.
Create a text-based Gantt chart from /tmp/clive/project.csv showing task timelines as ASCII bars. Write the chart to /tmp/clive/result.txt.

task: Create a vCard (.vcf) file for a business contact: Name 'Kiu Chen', Email 'kiu@ikangai.com', Company 'ikangai UG', Phone '+49 176 1234567', Address 'Leopoldstr. 1, 80802 München, Germany'. Save to /tmp/clive/contact.vcf. Write the path to /tmp/clive/result.txt.

Compare actual vs budget spending from /tmp/clive/budget.csv. Calculate variance (actual - budget) and variance percentage for each category. Write a formatted table to /tmp/clive/result.txt, flagging items over budget with 'OVER'.

task: Create a client-facing project status report. Include: project name 'ikangai Platform v2', date, status summary, key metrics (3 items completed, 2 in progress, 5 remaining), and next milestones. Write as formatted markdown to /tmp/clive/result.md.

Generate a professional invoice text file from structured data. Invoice from ikangai UG to CloudServe GmbH: 3 line items (Consulting 20h @ €150/h, Development 40h @ €120/h, Testing 10h @ €100/h). Include subtotal, 19% VAT, and total. Save to /tmp/clive/result.txt.
Read /tmp/clive/backlog.csv and sort tasks by priority (P0 > P1 > P2 > P3), then by effort (ascending). Write the sorted list to /tmp/clive/result.txt.

task: Generate a daily standup template for today (2026-04-09) for team member 'Martin'. Pull yesterday's completed tasks from /tmp/clive/done.log and today's planned tasks from /tmp/clive/planned.csv. Format as: Yesterday / Today / Blockers. Write to /tmp/clive/result.txt.
